headline: Why Is D-WAVE QUANTUM (QBTS) Up 8.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: D-WAVE QUANTUM (QBTS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Superior Profitability and Growth
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) clears the "Caviar Cruise" quality screen with strong revenue, EBIT growth, and a 59.47% ROIC. A durable fintech leader, it offers high profitability, solid cash flow, and a reasonable valuation for long-term investors.
